description: Not confined, restricted, or imprisoned; able to act or move without constraint. 'Ralu' names the quality of liberation—freedom from what binds, openness to what calls.
sound_symbolism: The word moves without constraint. 'Ra' releases with ease, bonds loosened. Then 'lu' flows freely, liberty embodied.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'ralu miona' (free person). Phi freedom is not isolation—it is freedom from harmful constraints while remaining in relationship.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Freedom includes freedom from exploitation—communities where all can flourish without domination.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: True freedom is liberation from craving and aversion—the mind unbound by reactive patterns.
